meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Version Control for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop losing client work. Master the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate version control and ship production-ready SaaS apps faster.
content.answer_block: The lack of version control is a ticking time bomb for freelancers. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you standardize your architecture, automate repository initialization, and integrate Claude Code for real-time file tracking. This workflow eliminates manual errors, ensures codebase integrity, and lets you ship client projects with confidence.
content.intro:
You’re in the middle of a high-stakes sprint, the client is refreshing their email, and you just accidentally overwrote the core logic of their application. Without version control, your hard work is a house of cards waiting for a gust of wind. The panic is real, but it’s entirely avoidable.

Professional development isn't just about writing code; it's about building a fortress around your progress. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural foundation, embedding version control best practices from the first commit. Combined with the raw power of Claude Code, you can transform your chaotic workflow into a predictable, high-velocity machine.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Environment
steps.description: Establish a standardized folder structure that enforces isolation and version control readiness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new production-ready project structure with Git initialization, .gitignore for sensitive keys, and a README template.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Tracking
steps.description: Link your local workspace to the Claude Code agent to ensure every change is logged and audited.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the current workspace to track changes and suggest commits based on logic blocks.

steps.title: Implement Atomic Commits
steps.description: Break your development into logical, reversible units to prevent catastrophic failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current feature set and break the implementation into three distinct, atomic commits.

steps.title: Automate Branching Strategy
steps.description: Use branches to isolate experimental features from the stable client-facing codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new feature branch for the upcoming payment integration and switch the current context to it.

steps.title: Sync and Validate
steps.description: Verify your project state against the remote repository to ensure no drift occurs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a diagnostic check to ensure all local changes are tracked and synced with the remote repository.

pro_tips: Always use a .env.example file in your template; never commit your actual .env file to Git.
Use Claude Code's --diff flag before every commit to catch accidental deletions before they hit the repo.
Standardize your commit messages using Conventional Commits to make your client project history look professional.
Automate your 'git push' triggers via Claude Code hooks to ensure you never forget to back up your progress.
Create a 'sandbox' branch for every client project where you can test risky refactors without touching the production code.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully initialized your first project, audit your existing client folders and retroactively apply the Antigravity template to your most active repositories to ensure consistent versioning across your entire portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop treating your code like a disposable script and start treating it like a professional asset. With these tools, you'll reclaim hours of lost time and deliver a higher quality product every single time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
